response.justification: Maria has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP protocols, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders — key requirements for this staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Proven full-stack expertise with TypeScript, cloud (AWS), and scalable systems
Strong open-source contributions and technical mentorship through workshops and projects
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization in experience
AI experience appears secondary to general software engineering; duration in GenAI unclear
Lack of demonstrated customer-facing technical leadership or enterprise deployment history
